append-empty-a4-page-to-pdf.title: Append an Empty A4 Page to a PDF
append-empty-a4-page-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, adding a new blank page, resizing it to A4 size, and saving the updated document.

insert-blank-page-at-index-three.title: Insert Blank Page at Specific Position in PDF
insert-blank-page-at-index-three.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, insert a blank page at index three, and save the modified document.

insert-page-with-copied-dimensions.title: Insert New Page with Same Size as Page 2
insert-page-with-copied-dimensions.description: Demonstrates how to read the dimensions of an existing PDF page and insert a new empty page at a specific position using the same size.

add-multiple-empty-pages-to-pdf.title: Add Multiple Empty Pages to PDF Sequentially
add-multiple-empty-pages-to-pdf.description: Shows how to add a series of empty pages to a PDF by iterating over a list of page counts and respecting a maximum page limit.

read-pdf-page-dimensions.title: Read PDF Page Dimensions
read-pdf-page-dimensions.description: Opens a PDF file, iterates through each page, and logs the width and height (in points) of every page to the console.

resize-pdf-page-to-letter-size.title: Resize PDF Page to Letter Size
resize-pdf-page-to-letter-size.description: Shows how to load a PDF, verify it has at least seven pages, and change page 7 to Letter format using the SetPageSize method, then save the document.

resize-all-pdf-pages-to-a5.title: Resize All PDF Pages to A5
resize-all-pdf-pages-to-a5.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its PageCollection, and resize each page to the predefined A5 size.

rotate-fourth-page-90-degrees.title: Rotate Fourth Page of PDF by 90 Degrees
rotate-fourth-page-90-degrees.description: Shows how to load a PDF, verify it has at least four pages, rotate the fourth page 90° clockwise, and save the modified document.

change-odd-pages-orientation-to-portrait.title: Change Odd Pages Orientation to Portrait
change-odd-pages-orientation-to-portrait.description: Loads a PDF, iterates over odd‑numbered pages and converts any landscape pages to portrait by swapping the MediaBox dimensions and updating the PageInfo flag, then saves the modified document.

move-page-9-to-first-position.title: Move Page 9 to First Position in PDF
move-page-9-to-first-position.description: Demonstrates how to reposition the ninth page of a PDF to the first position using Aspose.Pdf's page collection manipulation methods.

reorder-pdf-pages.title: Reorder PDF Pages Using Aspose.Pdf
reorder-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to rearrange pages of an existing PDF by specifying a new order array and saving the result as a new document.

delete-last-three-pages-from-pdf.title: Delete Last Three Pages from PDF
delete-last-three-pages-from-pdf.description: Shows how to remove the final three pages of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf by deleting pages in descending order and saving the updated file.

delete-range-of-pdf-pages.title: Delete a Range of PDF Pages
delete-range-of-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to remove pages 5 through 10 from a PDF in a single operation using Aspose.Pdf's Delete method.

insert-custom-sized-page-at-beginning.title: Insert Custom-Sized Page at Beginning of PDF
insert-custom-sized-page-at-beginning.description: Demonstrates how to add an empty page with a custom size of 200 × 300 points to the start of an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

append-page-to-pdf.title: Append a Page from One PDF to Another
append-page-to-pdf.description: Shows how to copy a page from a source PDF and append it to the end of a target PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

duplicate-third-page-pdf.title: Duplicate Third Page in PDF
duplicate-third-page-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to duplicate the third page of a PDF document and insert the copy immediately after the original using Aspose.Pdf.

rotate-all-pdf-pages-180-degrees.title: Rotate All PDF Pages 180 Degrees
rotate-all-pdf-pages-180-degrees.description: Shows how to load a PDF, iterate through every page, set each page's rotation to 180°, and save the modified document.

convert-pdf-pages-portrait-to-landscape.title: Convert PDF Pages from Portrait to Landscape
convert-pdf-pages-portrait-to-landscape.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through each page, swaps the MediaBox width and height using SetPageSize to change the orientation to landscape, and saves the modified document.

insert-blank-pages-double-pdf.title: Insert Blank Pages to Double PDF Page Count
insert-blank-pages-double-pdf.description: Loads a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, inserts an empty page after each existing page to double the total number of pages, and saves the modified document.

rotate-pdf-pages-by-parity.title: Rotate PDF Pages Based on Page Number Parity
rotate-pdf-pages-by-parity.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages, and rotate even‑numbered pages 90° while leaving odd pages unchanged.

export-pdf-page-dimensions-to-csv.title: Export PDF Page Dimensions to CSV
export-pdf-page-dimensions-to-csv.description: Loads a PDF document, reads each page's width and height, and writes the page number and dimensions to a CSV file for external analysis.

insert-external-pdf-page-at-index-two.title: Insert External PDF Page at Specific Position
insert-external-pdf-page-at-index-two.description: Loads a target and a source PDF, extracts a page from the source, and inserts it into the target document at index 2 while preserving the original size and rotation.

resize-first-pdf-page-custom-size.title: Resize First PDF Page to Custom Size
resize-first-pdf-page-custom-size.description: Shows how to change the dimensions of the first page of a PDF to 500 × 700 points using Aspose.Pdf.

rotate-pdf-pages-reverse-order.title: Rotate PDF Pages in Reverse Order (90° Clockwise)
rotate-pdf-pages-reverse-order.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, rotating each page 90 degrees clockwise starting from the last page, and saving the modified document.

move-pages-3-6-to-end.title: Move Pages 3‑6 to End of PDF
move-pages-3-6-to-end.description: Shows how to relocate pages 3 through 6 of a PDF to the document's end using Aspose.Pdf.

copy-mediabox-from-page-to-page.title: Copy MediaBox from One PDF Page to Another
copy-mediabox-from-page-to-page.description: Shows how to retrieve the MediaBox rectangle from page 8 of a PDF and apply it to page 12 using Aspose.Pdf.

insert-ten-empty-pages-at-pdf-midpoint.title: Insert Ten Empty Pages at PDF Midpoint
insert-ten-empty-pages-at-pdf-midpoint.description: Shows how to calculate the middle index of a PDF document and batch insert ten empty pages at that position using Aspose.Pdf.

resize-wide-pdf-pages-to-a4.title: Resize Wide PDF Pages to A4
resize-wide-pdf-pages-to-a4.description: Loads a PDF, checks each page's width, and resizes only pages wider than 600 points to A4 size, leaving narrower pages unchanged.

delete-specific-pages-from-pdf.title: Delete Specific Pages from PDF Using Aspose.Pdf
delete-specific-pages-from-pdf.description: Shows how to read page numbers from a configuration file and delete those pages from a PDF document with Aspose.Pdf.

reorder-pdf-pages-descending.title: Reorder PDF Pages in Descending Order
reorder-pdf-pages-descending.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, copy its pages in reverse (descending) order into a new document, optionally balance the page tree, and save the reordered file.

convert-pdf-pages-to-portrait.title: Convert PDF Pages to Portrait Orientation
convert-pdf-pages-to-portrait.description: Loads a PDF, examines each page's MediaBox dimensions, swaps width and height for landscape pages using SetPageSize, and saves the document so all pages are portrait.

rotate-every-third-pdf-page-90-degrees.title: Rotate Every Third PDF Page by 90 Degrees
rotate-every-third-pdf-page-90-degrees.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages, and rotate pages whose numbers are divisible by three by 90 degrees before saving the result.

delete-first-page-from-pdf.title: Delete First Page from PDF
delete-first-page-from-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, remove the first page, and save the modified document.

resize-pdf-pages-uniform-size.title: Resize PDF Pages to Uniform Size
resize-pdf-pages-uniform-size.description: Shows how to determine the largest page dimensions in a PDF and resize every page to those dimensions using Aspose.Pdf.

reset-pdf-page-rotation.title: Reset PDF Page Rotation to Original Orientation
reset-pdf-page-rotation.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through all pages, set each page's rotation to the default (0°) and save the restored document.

extract-resize-reinsert-pdf-pages.title: Extract, Resize, and Reinsert PDF Pages
extract-resize-reinsert-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to extract a range of pages from a PDF, change their dimensions to A4, and insert them at a new position using Aspose.Pdf.

reorder-pdf-pages-move-even-to-end.title: Reorder PDF Pages: Move Even Pages to End
reorder-pdf-pages-move-even-to-end.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, separate odd and even pages, and create a new document where all even‑numbered pages are appended after the odd ones while preserving their original order.

resize-pdf-pages-to-match-template.title: Resize PDF Pages to Match Template Size
resize-pdf-pages-to-match-template.description: Loads a source PDF and a template PDF, extracts the template's page dimensions, and applies those dimensions to every page in the source PDF before saving the result.

rotate-pdf-pages-by-configurable-angles.title: Rotate PDF Pages by Configurable Angles
rotate-pdf-pages-by-configurable-angles.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, rotating specific pages based on a dictionary of page‑number to angle, and saving the result using Aspose.Pdf.

add-transparent-separator-page-to-pdf.title: Add Transparent Separator Page to PDF
add-transparent-separator-page-to-pdf.description: Shows how to insert an empty page with a transparent background into an existing PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

delete-last-page-from-pdfs.title: Delete Last Page from PDFs in a Folder
delete-last-page-from-pdfs.description: Shows how to iterate over PDF files in a directory, remove the last page of each document using Aspose.Pdf, and overwrite the original files.

move-pdf-page-between-documents.title: Move PDF Page Between Documents
move-pdf-page-between-documents.description: Demonstrates how to transfer a single page from one PDF file to another while preserving its original rotation, size, and other page properties.

change-page-mediabox-crop-region.title: Change Page MediaBox to Crop PDF Region
change-page-mediabox-crop-region.description: Shows how to modify a PDF page's MediaBox (and optionally CropBox) to define a custom visible area without altering the page content, then saves the result.

resize-pdf-pages-to-fixed-width.title: Resize PDF Pages to Fixed Width
resize-pdf-pages-to-fixed-width.description: Demonstrates how to batch‑resize all pages in a PDF to a target width of 800 points while preserving the original aspect ratio, and then save the modified document.

delete-pdf-pages-from-list.title: Delete PDF Pages from List
delete-pdf-pages-from-list.description: Demonstrates reading page numbers from a text file and deleting those pages from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

reorder-pdf-pages-by-orientation.title: Reorder PDF Pages by Orientation (Landscape then Portrait)
reorder-pdf-pages-by-orientation.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, separate pages into landscape and portrait groups, and save a new PDF with all landscape pages first followed by portrait pages.

add-blank-front-matter-page-with-label-i.title: Add Blank Front-Matter Page with Custom Label "i" to PDF
add-blank-front-matter-page-with-label-i.description: Demonstrates inserting a blank page at the beginning of an existing PDF and assigning it a custom page label with the prefix "i" and no numeric numbering using Aspose.Pdf.

resize-pdf-pages-to-fit-printable-area.title: Resize PDF Pages to Fit Printable Area
resize-pdf-pages-to-fit-printable-area.description: Shows how to proportionally shrink PDF pages so they fit within an A4 printable area (595 × 842 points) using Aspose.Pdf.

insert-custom-sized-empty-page.title: Insert Custom-Sized Empty Page into PDF
insert-custom-sized-empty-page.description: Shows how to read page width and height from the console, insert a new empty page into an existing PDF, set the custom page size, and save the modified document using Aspose.Pdf.

resize-pdf-pages-to-template-size.title: Resize PDF Pages to Match Template Size
resize-pdf-pages-to-template-size.description: Shows how to resize every page of a PDF to the dimensions of a reference template PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-text-header-to-first-pdf-page.title: Add Text Header to First PDF Page Using MarginInfo
add-text-header-to-first-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to add a text header to the first page of a PDF document and configure its margins using Aspose.Pdf's MarginInfo.

add-html-header-with-css-to-first-three-.title: Add HTML Header with CSS to First Three PDF Pages
add-html-header-with-css-to-first-three-.description: Shows how to create an HTML fragment with embedded CSS and assign it as a header to the first three pages of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-image-footer-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Image Footer to PDF Pages
add-image-footer-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to load a PDF, iterate over each page, and add a scaled footer image at the bottom of every page using Aspose.Pdf.

add-image-footer-30-opacity-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Image Footer with 30% Opacity to PDF Pages
add-image-footer-30-opacity-to-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to add an image footer with 30% opacity to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-generation-date-footer-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Generation Date Footer to PDF Pages
add-generation-date-footer-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, create a footer containing the current date, and apply it to every page before saving the document.

add-diagonal-repeating-text-watermark-to.title: Add Diagonal Repeating Text Watermark to PDF Pages
add-diagonal-repeating-text-watermark-to.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, iterate through its pages, and apply a semi‑transparent diagonal text stamp that repeats across each page using Aspose.Pdf.

add-rotated-image-watermark-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Rotated Image Watermark to PDF Pages
add-rotated-image-watermark-to-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to place a 45° rotated, half‑size image watermark on every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-image-watermark-with-opacity-to-pdf-.title: Add Image Watermark with Opacity to PDF Pages
add-image-watermark-with-opacity-to-pdf-.description: Demonstrates how to apply a semi‑transparent image watermark to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-repeating-image-watermark-to-pdf-pag.title: Add Repeating Image Watermark to PDF Pages
add-repeating-image-watermark-to-pdf-pag.description: Demonstrates how to overlay a semi‑transparent image repeatedly in a grid across each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-yearly-text-watermark-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Yearly Text Watermark to PDF Pages
add-yearly-text-watermark-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to open a PDF, create a TextFragment that includes the current year, and apply it as a semi‑transparent watermark on every page using Aspose.Pdf.

add-curved-text-watermark-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Curved Text Watermark to PDF Pages
add-curved-text-watermark-to-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to add a semi‑transparent, rotated text watermark that follows a curved path to each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-semi-transparent-text-watermark-to-p.title: Add Semi-Transparent Text Watermark to PDF Pages
add-semi-transparent-text-watermark-to-p.description: Demonstrates how to add a semi‑transparent text watermark with an outline to each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-lightgray-background-to-pdf-pages.title: Add LightGray Background to All PDF Pages
add-lightgray-background-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through each page, set a LightGray background color for branding, and save the modified document.

set-transparent-background-for-pdf-pages.title: Set Transparent Background for PDF Pages
set-transparent-background-for-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to make the document and each page background transparent in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, useful for overlay scenarios.

set-pdf-page-background-color.title: Set PDF Page Background Color Using RGB
set-pdf-page-background-color.description: Demonstrates how to apply a corporate brand RGB background color to every page of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

set-pdf-page-background-cmyk.title: Set PDF Page Background Color Using CMYK Values
set-pdf-page-background-cmyk.description: Shows how to load a PDF, create a CMYK color, apply it as the background for every page, and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.

set-pdf-page-background-hsl.title: Set PDF Page Background Color Using HSL Values
set-pdf-page-background-hsl.description: Shows how to convert HSL color values to RGB and apply the resulting color as a page background in a PDF document with Aspose.Pdf.

set-pdf-page-background-from-theme.title: Set PDF Page Background Color from Theme Config
set-pdf-page-background-from-theme.description: Demonstrates how to read a theme name from a configuration file and apply the corresponding background color to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

alternating-page-background-colors.title: Set Alternating Page Background Colors in PDF
alternating-page-background-colors.description: Shows how to load a PDF, iterate through its pages, and assign alternating background colors (LightGray for even pages, White for odd pages) using Aspose.Pdf.

add-centered-page-numbers-to-pdf.title: Add Centered Page Numbers to PDF
add-centered-page-numbers-to-pdf.description: Shows how to insert a page number stamp that starts at 1 and is centered on every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

insert-roman-page-numbers.title: Insert Roman Numeral Page Numbers into PDF
insert-roman-page-numbers.description: Demonstrates how to add page numbers in uppercase Roman numerals to the first few pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-chapter-page-numbers-to-pdf.title: Add Chapter Page Numbers to PDF
add-chapter-page-numbers-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to insert page numbers with a custom "Chapter" prefix on each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-leading-zero-page-numbers.title: Insert Page Numbers with Leading Zeros
add-leading-zero-page-numbers.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through each page, and adds a centered page number stamp formatted with leading zeros (e.g., 01, 02). The stamp uses Helvetica font and gray color before saving the modified document.

add-page-numbers-to-pdf.title: Add Page Numbers (Page X of Y) to PDF
add-page-numbers-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, create a PageNumberStamp with a custom "Page # of #" format, and apply it to every page before saving the document.

add-page-numbers-with-slash-separator.title: Add Page Numbers with '/' Separator to PDF
add-page-numbers-with-slash-separator.description: Loads a PDF, creates a PageNumberStamp using the "#/#" format to show current page and total pages separated by a slash, applies it to each page, and saves the result.

insert-page-numbers-superscript.title: Insert Page Numbers with Superscript Formatting
insert-page-numbers-superscript.description: Demonstrates how to add page numbers to each PDF page using a PageNumberStamp and adjust the bottom margin and font size to achieve a superscript appearance.

add-page-numbers-custom-font.title: Add Page Numbers with Custom Font to PDF
add-page-numbers-custom-font.description: Demonstrates how to insert sequential page numbers on each PDF page using Arial 14‑pt font with Aspose.Pdf.

add-page-numbers-with-embedded-custom-fo.title: Add Page Numbers with Embedded Custom Font to PDF
add-page-numbers-with-embedded-custom-fo.description: Demonstrates how to insert page numbers on every PDF page using a custom TrueType font that is embedded from an external file.

add-page-numbers-to-odd-pdf-pages.title: Add Page Numbers to Odd PDF Pages
add-page-numbers-to-odd-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to insert page numbers only on odd-numbered pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf by iterating through the document pages and applying a PageNumberStamp.

add-page-numbers-to-even-pdf-pages.title: Add Page Numbers to Even PDF Pages
add-page-numbers-to-even-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, loop through its pages, and add a page number stamp only on even-numbered pages before saving the file.

add-bates-numbering-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Bates Numbering to PDF Pages
add-bates-numbering-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to apply Bates numbering starting at 1000 with a dash separator to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-bates-numbering-with-custom-prefix-s.title: Add Bates Numbering with Custom Prefix and Suffix to PDF
add-bates-numbering-with-custom-prefix-s.description: Demonstrates how to apply Bates numbering to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, with a custom "DOC" prefix and "-2026" suffix and optional digit formatting.

add-bates-numbering-with-alphanumeric-pr.title: Add Bates Numbering with Alphanumeric Prefix to PDF
add-bates-numbering-with-alphanumeric-pr.description: Shows how to load a PDF, apply Bates numbering with a custom alphanumeric prefix and zero‑padded numbers to every page, and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-bates-numbering-to-pdf-pages__v2.title: Add Bates Numbering to PDF Pages
add-bates-numbering-to-pdf-pages__v2.description: Shows how to apply year‑based Bates numbering (format 2026‑####) to each page of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-bates-numbering-increment-5.title: Add Bates Numbering with Increment of 5 to PDFs
add-bates-numbering-increment-5.description: Shows how to batch‑process PDF files and apply Bates numbering that increments by 5 on each page using Aspose.Pdf.

remove-bates-numbering-add-new-sequence.title: Remove Existing Bates Numbering and Add New Sequence to PDF
remove-bates-numbering-add-new-sequence.description: Shows how to delete all Bates numbering artifacts from a PDF and then apply a new Bates numbering sequence using Aspose.Pdf.

remove-bates-numbering-from-pdf-pages.title: Remove Bates Numbering from PDF Pages
remove-bates-numbering-from-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to delete all Bates numbering stamps from a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf's PageCollectionExtensions. The example loads a PDF, removes the numbering, and saves the result.

remove-add-headers-footers-pdf.title: Remove and Add Headers and Footers to PDF Pages
remove-add-headers-footers-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to clear existing headers and footers on each page of a PDF and assign new header and footer content using Aspose.Pdf.

read-pdf-page-count.title: Read PDF Page Count with Aspose.Pdf
read-pdf-page-count.description: Shows how to load a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf and retrieve the total number of pages without saving the file.

read-pdf-page-width-height.title: Read PDF Page Width and Height
read-pdf-page-width-height.description: Loads a PDF document and iterates through each page to calculate and log its width and height in points using Aspose.Pdf.

adjust-pdf-bleedbox.title: Adjust PDF BleedBox for Printer Specifications
adjust-pdf-bleedbox.description: Shows how to read each page's BleedBox, expand it by a fixed amount, and save the updated PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

retrieve-trimbox-values-after-cropping.title: Retrieve TrimBox Values After Cropping a PDF Page
retrieve-trimbox-values-after-cropping.description: Loads a PDF, optionally sets a CropBox on a page, then reads and prints each page's TrimBox to verify the final content area.

crop-pdf-pages-remove-margins.title: Crop PDF Pages to Remove Margins
crop-pdf-pages-remove-margins.description: Shows how to set the CropBox of each page using rectangle coordinates to trim a uniform margin from all pages of a PDF document.

set-bleedbox-extend-cropbox.title: Set BleedBox Extending Beyond CropBox in PDF
set-bleedbox-extend-cropbox.description: Demonstrates how to read each page of a PDF, calculate a bleed area by extending the CropBox by 5 points on all sides, and assign it to the page's BleedBox using Aspose.Pdf.

trim-white-space-from-pdf-pages.title: Trim White Space from PDF Pages
trim-white-space-from-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to remove surrounding white space on each PDF page by detecting the content bounding box and setting the TrimBox accordingly, skipping blank pages.

trim-blank-pdf-pages-with-tolerance.title: Remove Blank PDF Pages with Custom Tolerance
trim-blank-pdf-pages-with-tolerance.description: The example loads a PDF, evaluates each page for blank content using a custom pixel‑tolerance factor, deletes pages considered blank, and saves the trimmed document.

crop-pdf-pages-to-4-3-aspect-ratio.title: Crop PDF Pages to 4:3 Aspect Ratio
crop-pdf-pages-to-4-3-aspect-ratio.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through a PDF, calculate a 4:3 crop region for each page, and apply it using the CropBox property, then save the result.

add-header-company-logo-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Header with Company Logo to PDF Pages
add-header-company-logo-to-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, create a header on each page, and insert a left‑aligned company logo image using Aspose.Pdf.

add-bold-uppercase-header-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Bold Uppercase Header to Each PDF Page
add-bold-uppercase-header-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, create a bold uppercase header using a TextFragment, and insert it on every page of the document.
